loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing total current THD as proxy for harmonic distortion; flicker, crest factor, and trend data are not measured by this asset.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing current THD trend (R/Y/B) — voltage THD and 5th/7th harmonic data are not measured for this UPS asset.

loop1.title: Load Impact & Transformer Stress
loop1.note: Showing Power Factor, True PF, and PF Gap from live data; K-Factor derived from current THD compliance; watch lines and axis scales are config defaults.
